features: Load project settings and validate build.gradle
Install APK via ADB to connected devices
Real-time log streaming from Gradle/ADB to UI
Premium Minimalist Apple-style Dark Blue UI
Open APK Folder directly from UI (Cross-platform)
Branding: Custom Footer & Go Version display

patterns: Event-based log streaming via Wails EventsEmit
Minimalist Apple-style design system with Dark Blue palette
gotchas: Wails requires Go 1.22+ and explicit binding generation
Tailwind CSS in Wails/Vite needs .cjs config for ESM projects
XDG-Open is required for Linux folder opening
CSS @import must be at the very top of style.css
conventions: Glassmorphism UI utility classes in style.css
